name: context-mri
description: Diagnose which context file changed an agent result, repair it with Codex, and verify the fix.

interface.shortDescription: Find the context file that changed an agent result
interface.longDescription: Context MRI brings a local diagnose, repair, and verify loop into Codex. It measures one-file-at-a-time context effects, exposes inspectable evidence, creates a fingerprinted Context Guard, and verifies the repaired pack without uploading source code or requiring billing.
defaultPrompt: Audit these agent context files and identify the failure source.
Explain the strongest Context MRI finding and its evidence.
Verify this repaired context pack against its regression guard.
